data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an audit trail with IP address and timestamp, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence of such an audit trail in the system. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement, as the necessary data to support the audit trail functionality is absent.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for audit trail functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.
